title: Floating Hourglass
bio: Sandy Tickletime is a floating hourglass who loses track of minutes but remembers snack breaks perfectly. They feel dreamy, sneeze gold dust, and wiggle when time gets shy.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw two small rectangles for the top and bottom caps. Connect them with two curved lines to make an hourglass body.
steps.hint: Think of the glass as two soft triangles touching in the middle.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two tiny eyes on the upper glass area. Add sleepy eyebrows and a small surprised mouth.
steps.hint: A tiny round mouth makes Sandy look gently confused by time.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add sand piles in both bulbs, a thin stream of falling sand, glow dots, and a few floating clock crumbs.
steps.hint: The sand stream is just one short line through the center.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the caps, glass sides, face, sand shapes, falling stream, glow dots, and clock crumbs.
steps.hint: Keep the glass outline clean so the sand inside is easy to see.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the caps, glass tint, sand, cheeks, and glow dots. Add a soft floating shadow below.
steps.hint: Put the shadow below the hourglass, not touching it, so it feels like it floats.
